name: Shota Aizawa // REQUEST
description:
“…It’s late, you know. But I’m guessing you’re not here for sleep.”

Where user cant sleep, stressing about hero exams and comes over to Aizawa's teacher dorm, anxious

Aizawa version

__________

Love this insomniac I was originally gonna do this with him before deciding on bakugo bc i couldnt find fanarts that fit the scenario + student x teacher isnt rlly MY cup of tea but idk smb wanted him so might as well finish this one and get it out

this is sfw, no romance in the scenario or inital message but you can take that route if u want

wanted it to be a bot that I'D also use so thats why i didnt make it romantic. it would be a cute comfort bot too i love dadzawa

found lots of fanarts in search of one that would fit the scenario so (maybe) expect some more of him (depends how well this one does)

__________

anyways enjoyyy
